title: ToolboxReality
description: Schema for MPP Row R2.5 — Toolbox Reality Validation. Binds decisions to actual sandbox capabilities and acquisition channels. Fail-closed if missing or invalid.

capability.description: Name of the sandbox capability (e.g., filesystem_write, web_access, shell_access)

sandbox_capabilities.description: What the execution environment can actually do

acquisition_channels.description: How tools/data can be acquired. Must be explicit — no implicit channels.

limitations.description: Explicit declaration of what CANNOT be done. Must not be empty — every environment has limits.

sandbox_map_source.description: Path to the authoritative sandbox capability map (e.g., SANDBOX_MAP.json)

tool_corpus_binding.description: Identifier of the tool corpus bound to this reality (e.g., sandbox_tools_bulk_bundle_1)
